name: Illinois
agency: Illinois Secretary of State, Business Services Department
address: 501 S. Second Street, Suite 328, Springfield, IL 62756

steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC per your operating agreement
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with Illinois Department of Revenue
Obtain tax clearance from Illinois Department of Revenue
File in duplicate with the Secretary of State with $5 filing fee
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and assumed business names
llc.notes: Filing fee is $5. Expedited 24-hour processing available for an additional $100 (in person at Springfield or Chicago offices only).

steps: Obtain board of directors resolution authorizing dissolution
Wind up business affairs and settle all obligations
File final tax returns with Illinois Department of Revenue
Obtain tax clearance from Illinois Department of Revenue
File in duplicate with the Secretary of State with $5 filing fee
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and assumed business names
corporation.notes: Filing fee is $5. Expedited 24-hour processing available for an additional $100 at Springfield or Chicago offices. Cash not accepted; make checks payable to Illinois Secretary of State.

tax.notes: Must obtain a Letter of Good Standing or tax clearance from the Illinois Department of Revenue before filing dissolution. File final income tax return, sales tax return, and withholding tax returns.

requirements.publicationDetails: Must publish dissolution notice once per week for three consecutive weeks in a newspaper in the county of the registered office.
requirements.employeeNotification: Illinois WARN Act requires 60 days notice for mass layoffs (75+ employees)
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing with deadline for submitting claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete and all annual reports are current
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Entity continues to exist for purpose of winding up after dissolution
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Majority vote of members or per operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by two-thirds shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
